full_text:
Jia Cong (Mengjian) 賈琮 (孟堅)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jia Cong (賈琮), styledMengjian (孟堅), was born in Dong. A successful administrator, was called Father Jia for the way he put down the Jiao revolt in 184. Jia Cong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
